commit.message:
Fix glob expansions with glob chars in directory components (#339)

`foo*/ba*` expanded to `/full/path/to/foobar/baz` instead of
`foobar/baz` because `PathPatternExpansion` split at the last `/`,
putting glob chars in the prefix. `strip_prefix("/cwd/foo*")` then
failed against `/cwd/foobar/baz`, falling through to return the absolute
path.

### Fix

Split the pattern at the last `/` **before** the first unescaped glob
metacharacter (`*`, `?`, `[`) instead of at the last `/` overall:

```
foo*/ba*       → prefix="",    rhs="foo*/ba*"     → foobar/baz
abc/foo*/ba*   → prefix="abc", rhs="foo*/ba*"     → abc/foobar/baz
$PWD/man       → prefix="$PWD", rhs="man"         → unchanged
```

### Test changes

- Added `foo/baz` and `abc/foo/baz` to the Docker test filesystem
- Added integration test cases for `foo*/ba*` and `abc/foo*/ba*`
- Updated three existing tests to account for the new `abc/` directory

> [!WARNING]
>

addresses (expand for details)</summary>

Add dim+italic palette style for inline history metadata (#342)

The `#idx= time=` metadata appended to inline history suggestions used
`secondary_text()` (dim only), making it visually indistinguishable from
the suggestion text itself.

## Changes

- **`src/palette.rs`** — New `Palette::history_inline_meta()` style:
`DIM | ITALIC`
- **`src/app/mod.rs`** — Swap `secondary_text()` →
`history_inline_meta()` on the `extra_info_text` span in inline history
rendering

```rust
pub fn history_inline_meta() -> Style {
    Style::default()
        .add_modifier(Modifier::DIM)
        .add_modifier(Modifier::ITALIC)
}
```

<!-- START COPILOT CODING AGENT SUFFIX -->



<!-- START COPILOT ORIGINAL PROMPT -->



<details>

<summary>Original prompt</summary>

> for the inline history make a new palette style for the # idx= time=
stuff .
> it should be dim and in italics.


</details>



<!-- START COPILOT CODING AGENT TIPS -->
---

💬 Send tasks to Copilot coding agent from
[Slack](https://gh.io/cca-slack-docs) and
[Teams](https://gh.io/cca-teams-docs) to turn conversations into code.
Copilot posts an update in your thread when it's finished.

---------

Co-authored-by: HalFrgrd <4559349+HalFrgrd@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix spelling, grammar, and capitalisation in README, source, and demo files (#341)

Fixes inconsistent capitalisation of "Bash", several spelling mistakes,
and minor grammar/formatting issues across the README, Rust source (clap
help text), tape demo files, and example scripts.

## Capitalisation
- `bash` → `Bash` in prose references to the shell (README feature list,
section headings, link text)
- `bash` → `Bash` in `src/lib.rs` clap doc comments (visible in `flyline
agent-mode --help`)
- `bash` → `Bash` in `tapes/demo_overview.tape` and
`tapes/demo_agent_mode.tape` (user-visible demo text)
- `bash` → `Bash` in `examples/agent_mode.sh` example system prompt
strings

## Spelling
- `Agen mode` → `Agent mode`
- `dats` → `data`
- `exteneded` → `extended`

## Grammar & formatting
- `setup completions` → `set up completions` (verb form)
- `call grep's … if it's setup` → `calls grep's … if it's set up`
- `mid way` → `midway`
- Missing spaces: `…Settings = 1])to` → `…) to` and `to\`Control` → `to
\`Control`

<!-- START COPILOT CODING AGENT SUFFIX -->



<!-- START COPILOT ORIGINAL PROMPT -->



<details>

<summary>Original prompt</summary>

> check the readme and docs for spelling mistakes. also check for
inconsistent capitalisation.
> Bash should be capitalized . flyline shouldn't be unless it starts a
sentence.


</details>



<!-- START COPILOT CODING AGENT TIPS -->
---

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/microsoft/vscode-pull-request-github/sessions/a47a6887-194e-4dd7-966a-3459c61cc24c

* Fix: Use rawComment.body in applySuggestionWithCopilot to exclude AI warning suffix

When applying a suggestion using AI for Copilot Code Review comments,
the rendered comment body included the "Copilot is powered by AI, so
mistakes are possible" suffix. Use rawComment.body instead to get the
original comment text without the display-only warning.

commit.message:
climbingTiles: use fail-safe fetchOverpass() for refresh (#6)

### Description

The climbing-tiles refresh was hardcoded to `maps.mail.ru` Overpass
instance, which is currently down.

Switches to `fetchOverpass()` which rotates through multiple servers
(`overpass.private.coffee` → `overpass-api.de` → `maps.mail.ru`) with
automatic retry on 429/5xx errors.

---------

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: zbycz <385047+zbycz@users.noreply.github.com>

scripts: add SVG timing chart to solid benchmark report (#259) * scripts: add SVG timing chart to solid benchmark report Add _render_chart_svg() which generates a horizontal grouped bar chart of per-fixture call durations as a pure-SVG string (stdlib only, no external dependencies). Chart design: - One row group per fixture, fixture ID labels on the left - Within each group: one native (top) + imported (bottom) bar pair per method (DTI/DTO(p,v), Inside(p), DTI(p) G4<->OCCT, DTO(p) G4<->OCCT, SN(p), CreatePolyhedron()) - Log10 x-axis so fixtures spanning many orders of magnitude are still distinguishable; power-of-10 tick marks with ms/s/µs labels - Two-row legend with colour-coded method pairs; subtitle clarifies top=native / bottom=imported and log scale - Alternating subtle row backgrounds; dark theme matching existing HTML report files - SVG on each bar for hover tooltips Integration: - _render_chart_svg() is called from main(); the SVG is passed to _render_report() via a new chart_svg= keyword argument - _render_report() embeds the chart as a base64 data URI in an <img> tag inside a collapsible <details> block, inserted between the aggregate table and the per-fixture table - main() also writes reports/bench-chart.svg as a standalone artifact Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com> * fix: SVG chart log-scale inversion and XML injection in fixture labels (#263) * Initial plan * fix: SVG chart log-scale inversion and XML-escape fixture labels Co-authored-by: wdconinc <4656391+wdconinc@users.noreply.github.com> Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/eic/G4OCCT/sessions/fea31b7a-e005-4958-94e3-ba10450df530 --------- Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com> Co-authored-by: wdconinc <4656391+wdconinc@users.noreply.github.com> --------- Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com> Co-authored-by: Copilot <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com> Co-authored-by: wdconinc <4656391+wdconinc@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: G4OCCT
repository.description: Geant4 interface to Open CASCADE Technology (OCCT) geometry definitions

repository.name: IssueTrackerApp
repository.description: An Aspire and Blazor solution for tracking users issues with the ability to comment and vote on the solution

commit.message:
feat: substituir Firebase Storage por base64 no Firestore

- Remove dependência do Firebase Storage (não disponível no plano gratuito)
- Converte imagem para base64 via Canvas com redimensionamento (max 300x300, JPEG 75%)
- Base64 salvo diretamente no campo foto do jogador no Firestore
- Sem necessidade de configurar Storage ou regras adicionais

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: modal de jogadores com scroll e altura máxima

- max-height: 90vh no modal-content para não ultrapassar a tela
- overflow-y: auto na lista de jogadores para scroll interno
- header e botões ficam fixos, apenas a lista rola

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: usar logo-sem-fundo.png no header, favicon e watermark

- Remove mix-blend-mode: screen (não necessário com PNG transparente)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: upload de foto de jogadores para Firebase Storage

- Adiciona SDK do Firebase Storage
- Substitui campo URL por input de arquivo com preview circular
- Upload automático ao salvar (Storage path: jogadores/{teamId}/{idx}.ext)
- Botão de remoção de foto
- Botão Salvar desabilitado durante upload com feedback visual

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: toasts para todas as operações de escrita no banco

- Adiciona showToast() com tipos success, error e info
- Remove todos os alert() nativos substituindo por toasts
- Toasts de sucesso: salvar placar, partida, config, time, rodadas, etc
- Toasts de info: limpar placar/partida, excluir, bracket criado
- Toasts de erro: substituem showError() inline
- Animação de entrada/saída suave, auto-remove após 3s (5s para msgs importantes)
- Responsivo: ocupa largura total no mobile

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: player profiles with team popover and mobile card

- Add up to 3 players per team (photo, name, nickname, level, lane)
- Admin can edit players via 👥 button on each team
- Desktop: hover team name in standings shows popover card
- Mobile: tap team name opens modal with player details
- Player data stored in Firestore as jogadores array on team doc

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: renomear GP/GC/SG para PP/PC/SP e adicionar seção de regras editável

- GP → PP (Pontos Pró), GC → PC (Pontos Contra), SG → SP (Saldo de Pontos)
- Nova aba 'Regras' visível para todos os usuários
- Admin pode editar o texto das regras via painel admin
- Regras salvas no Firestore junto com as outras configs

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

docs: add Copilot skill for PR history lesson updates (#261)

* docs: add Copilot skill for PR history lesson updates

Adds .github/skills/pr-history-lessons/SKILL.md — a Copilot CLI skill
that describes the repeatable workflow for reviewing merged PR history
and codifying recurring reviewer corrections as new rules in AGENTS.md.

The skill covers: determining the PR range, fetching review comments via
gh CLI, synthesising recurring lessons, mapping them to AGENTS.md sections,
verifying with codespell/pre-commit, and filing a PR via the worktree
workflow.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Apply suggestion from @Copilot

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

docs: add lessons from PRs #140–#257 to AGENTS.md (#258)

New and updated rules extracted from reviewer feedback on 117 merged PRs:

- §2 Include Style: add IWYU workflow note (iwyu.yml / iwyu.imp)
- §3 Build Requirements: clarify C++20 features available; std::numbers::pi
  preferred over M_PI / acos(-1.0)
- §5 Testing: add assembly fixture TCL/DRAWEXE rule; add GDML+SPDX rule
- §6 CI: add pip venv note (read-only system Python in container); add
  FetchContent network-restriction note with find_package-first pattern
- §9 Geometry: add kInfinity-is-finite rule (use >= kInfinity, not
  std::isinf()); add public-accessor rule (no direct fScale/fSolidPtr access)
- §10 Code Style: add 'using' declaration preference for long type names

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: 管理员报告页切换周/月报时重新获取数据

之前切换周报/月报或翻页时，ReportEditor 仍显示初始加载的周报数据，
导致月报无法正确生成和发布。现在切换类型/周期时会重新调用
getAdminReportData 获取对应数据，并用 key 强制重新挂载编辑器。

feat: implementar regras de pontuação com tiebreak

- Vitória normal = 3 pts, Derrota normal = 0 pts
- Empate = 1 pt para cada
- Vitória no tiebreak = 2 pts, Derrota no tiebreak = 1 pt
- Checkbox de tiebreak no modal de edição de placar
- Badge 'TB' nos cards de jogos decididos no tiebreak
- Colunas VT e DT na tabela de classificação
- Limpar placar também reseta o tiebreak

refactor: rewrite Socratic rules with validated methodology

- Replace 4 generic rules with 3 Iron Laws + B+C anti-railroad mechanism
- Add 5-phase teaching model (P0-P5) to 課前/課中 flow
- Add S1-S5 support gradient with S1 purity constraint
- Add 6 student type presets (E1-E6)
- Add 4-item quick self-check every 5 turns
- Add Last Mile Rule, Observer Lock, Naming Rights
- Add P0 milestone keywords (map not script) design
- Based on 25-paper research + 2 experimental teaching sessions

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix React #130 - Use dynamic backend URL configuration

Changes:
- Created config.js in public/ to dynamically load backend URL
- Created useBackendUrl hook for proper URL resolution
- Updated all components to use getBackendUrl() function
- Added config.js script tag to index.html
- BACKEND_URL now loads at runtime, not build time
- Fallback to production URL if config.js fails

This fixes the issue where Netlify was using cached env variables.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: mi-sistema-erp
repository.description: Sistema ERP con facturación, inventario , RRHH.

commit.message:
feat: add lucky wheel feature and admin nav active indicator

- Add lucky wheel (幸运转盘) for random family decision-making
  - Canvas-based wheel with smooth animation and equal visual segments
  - Weighted random selection (backend only, not visual)
  - Event description support for recording what the spin decides
  - Public page at /lucky-wheel with last result display
  - Admin management for participants (CRUD, weight, color, active toggle)
  - Admin stats with monthly breakdown and event history
  - GET/POST API endpoints at /api/lucky-wheel
  - Seed data with default family members and sample records
- Add active nav indicator (small triangle) below selected admin menu item
  - Triangle centered under text label, not icon
  - Exact match for /admin, prefix match for sub-pages
- Update feedback categories to include 幸运转盘
- Update prompt guide with wheel prompt template
- Update new-feature page to parse wheel prompts
- Update README with lucky-wheel routes and structure
- Homepage cards in single-row flex layout (responsive)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix React #130 and backend robustness

Frontend changes:
- Added better error handling in App.js fetch calls
- Handle both array and object responses from API
- Added HTTP status checking before parsing JSON
- Set empty array on fetch error to prevent crashes

Backend changes:
- Improved CORS configuration for Netlify frontend
- Added health check endpoint
- Added error handlers for 404 and 500
- Changed debug=True to debug=False for production

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

  da tabela (corrige overflow no mobile)

fix: corrigir carregamento inicial após hard refresh

O listener de mata_mata era o último a chegar e chamava afterUpdate(false)
que não executava renderAll(). Adiciona flag firstRender para garantir
renderAll() completo na primeira vez que todos os dados estão prontos.

  showLoading(false) quando todos os dados estão prontos
- Reseta roundInitialized após gerar rodadas para recalcular rodada atual
- Navega automaticamente para aba Jogos após gerar rodadas

commit.message:
v2.0: Context瘦身 + 文件架构重构 + 教学进度更新

主要变更:
- CLAUDE.md → copilot-instructions.md (启动入口重命名)
- 新增 MAINTAINER.md (维护者手册)
- system.md 拆分为 system_core.md + system_reference.md
- knowledge_points.md 按章拆分为 knowledge_points/ 目录
- story.md 拆出 prologue.md (序章独立)
- story_progression.md 按章拆分为 story_progression/ 目录
- 角色文件独立到 characters/ (rin/ritsu/saku)
- 操作规则嵌入 runtime 文件头部 (策略B)
- 练习册/讲义从 PDF 转为 Markdown + symlink
- 旧版文件归档到 archive/
- 修复 wechat_group.md 中 3 处指向旧文件的引用
- 启动 context 从 ~134KB 降至 ~67KB

教学进度: Ch.23 Gauss's Law (2/2) 完成, 下节课继续平面对称
